vehicle.cab_type: high-roof sleeper cab (visible aerodynamic roof and side panels)
vehicle.camera_height: slightly below cab roof level, approximately headlight height

composition.truck_orientation: front-left three-quarters with left side and most of front visible
composition.important_crop_information: complete cab, left side, and lower front are visible, but right rear wheels and far right cab edge are cropped

company_identity.position: on roof, above windshield (horizontal, yellow letters on blue background)
company_identity.appearance: horizontal, central, high-visibility yellow block letters

company_identity.position: on left door, above yellow band (horizontal, yellow letters on blue background)
company_identity.appearance: horizontal, medium size, clean block font

company_identity.position: side of cab (large, red letters, partially on blue background, partially over yellow band)
lower left side skirt near rear wheels (small horizontal yellow letters)

owner_signatures.position: center front, grille area, horizontal, large red letters
right above side window on cab, angled script in yellow
under “WTS” on side of cab (horizontal, small yellow letters)

roof_lights.position: roof, far left and far right edges

grille_lights.position: within main grille, left and right from center

bumper_lights.position: lower bumper, outer left and right corners

main_headlights.position: lower section of front, extreme left and right sides

front_geometry.grille_description: two wide horizontal bars, central circular Volvo logo, mesh background, integrated rectangular lights
front_geometry.headlight_description: each side: stacked, angular L-shaped assemblies with vertical LED signature pattern, DLRs above, indicator and main headlamp elements below
front_geometry.bumper_description: full-width blue with two integrated round fog/auxiliary lights at both lower corners, thin and color-matched to cab
